case_title: ALLAN SCHWARTZ ESQ VS. MARIA CAFIRMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ ESQ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT CAFIRMA, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
